RESUME.Summary: 2-3 sentence professional summary tailored to the role. Concise — this resume must fit one US Letter page.
ExperienceBullets: First bullet tailored to the role, under 25 words.
Optional third bullet (omit when the experience is older or less relevant).
EducationCoursework: Comma-separated list of 2-4 most relevant courses from this education entry's transcript (or one-sentence focus summary if no transcript).
ProjectDescriptions: One-sentence description of the FIRST selected project, tailored to the role, under 25 words.
One-sentence description of the SECOND selected project, under 25 words.
RESUME.TechList: Comma-separated list of technologies most relevant to the role.

COVER.Company_Name: Name of the company being applied to.
COVER.Location: Company location (city, state) if known, else empty.
COVER.Intro: Opening paragraph that names the role and hooks the reader.
COVER.Body1: First body paragraph: most relevant experience tied to the posting's needs.
COVER.Body2: Second body paragraph: complementary skills, projects, or motivation.
COVER.Conclusion: Closing paragraph with call to action.
